title: ilex laureola var. genuina
intro: Ilex laureola var. genuina, also known as the Holly-leaved Laurel or Spiny Wintergreen, is a plant species in the family Aquifoliaceae. The leaves of this plant contain compounds with medicinal properties, including alkaloids and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Ilex laureola var. genuina include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and immune function.
